title: Mellow Sweet Brazilian Molasses Skewers
description: A cultured and tender Brazilian dish featuring molasses, grilled to perfection on a yakimono grill, suitable for shojin-friendly diets. This nostalgic treat is a classic in Brazilian cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to medium heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together molasses, brown sugar, coconut milk, and lemon juice until well combined.
Add the pineapple, banana, and peach chunks to the bowl and toss to coat with the molasses mixture.
Thread the fruit chunks onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on the grill and cook for 10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Brush the skewers with the remaining molasses mixture during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve the skewers warm, garnished with additional coconut milk if desired.
